title: centaurea × sanctae-barbarae
intro: Centaurea × sanctae-barbarae, also known as Mountain Bluet or Centaurea × sanctae-barbarae, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, derived from the cross between Centaurea montana and Centaurea × leucantha. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Centaurea × sanctae-barbarae include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
